content.stem: Find the missing piece. Big dog, small cat, big bird, ___
content.explanation: The pattern alternates big animal, small animal. After big bird, a small animal comes next. The animals are all different.

distractor_rationale.reasoning: Child sees animals changing but misses the big/small alternation
Child focuses on size pattern but repeats an animal already used
Child tries to connect with previous animal instead of following both patterns
